title: Happy 20th Birthday to Cavallo!
h1: Freedom in Motion - Celebrating Cavallo's 20th Birthday
text: Freedom in Motion - Celebrating Cavallo's 20th Birthday Forged by Fire. Guided by the Horse. This year is shaping up to be a big one – full of news we’ve been eager to share, new products, exciting events, and some truly meaningful milestones. And in March, this year, its our Birthday… Cavallo is turning 20! The Fire Horse cycle is significant to Cavallo. It appears only once every sixty years. Historically, it marks periods of acceleration, disruption, and decisive change. This is not a year where waiting works. Clarity, timing, and positioning matter more than effort alone. As we mark our 20th year in the Year of the Fire Horse, a symbol of forward motion, independence, and endurance, we are this too; everything we do, we do for the horse. “We never stood still. We listened, learned, and kept moving forward.” — Carole Herder, Founder Twenty Years. One Incredible Journey. This year, Cavallo turns twenty. Even writing that sentence feels a little unreal, twenty years, a whole lifetime in business years, a whole generation of horses and riders and stories I never could have imagined when this began. If you know me, you know I pay attention to synchronicities. I personally am entertained that I have 7 planets in the fire sign on my astrological chart. Fire is passion, fire is change, fire is movement and the moment a person finally says, “No. There has to be a better way.” This s

title: LEB (Long Ear Boot) Donkey Hoof Boot Cushion Pads
text: Cavallo® LEB Donkey Hoof Boot Pads / Insoles Cavallo LEB Donkey Hoof Boot Pads provide added comfort, protection, and shock absorption for donkeys who need extra support. Donkey hooves are living, dynamic structures that can become sore, sensitive, or stressed due to terrain, workload, health conditions, or environmental factors. These pads help reduce concussion, protect sensitive soles, and improve overall comfort in a wide range of situations. Product Features: Shock & concussion-absorbing cushioned insole Durable, flexible, and easy to clean Removable insole for extra cushion and comfort Can be cut to fit all Cavallo LEB Boot sizes Can be added to your LEB Hoof Boots to tighten/improve boot fit between trims Can stimulate blood circulation during hoof therapy/rehabilitation, Laminitis, hoof injury, during turnout, transport or on trails 5 mm thickness. Made of a specially formulated Microcellular foam compound (weight: 9 grams per pad ) SOLD IN PAIRSWhy Use Cavallo LEB Hoof Boot Pads for Donkeys? Hoof Comfort & Protection: Absorbs concussion on rocky trails, gravel, pavement, and hard-packed ground Provides relief on hard, dry summer ground and frozen winter footing Helps protect thin soles and sensitive hooves Hoof Rehabilitation & Medical Support Ideal to give comfort and relief to donkeys recovering from or managing: Laminitis, Founder White line disease Hoof abscesses B

title: Carole Honoured with RBC Finalist Award
text: Honoured at Home for Work That Reached the World There are moments when recognition feels especially meaningful. Not because it’s public or prestigious, but because it comes from home. Seeing our journey reflected back through our local Sunshine Coast, BC, newspaper was one of those moments. It was heartwarming in a quiet, grounding way, a reminder that work rooted in a small, rural community can still ripple outward, touching horses and horse people far beyond our forested coastline. Read Local Article >> A National Nod for Horse-First Innovation This year-end 2025 brought a special moment that touched me deeply. I was named Regional Finalist in the 2025 RBC Canadian Women Entrepreneur Awards – an honour shared in our local Sunshine Coast BC newspaper. Being chosen from more than 9,000 applicants for this award was humbling, and seeing it highlighted through our home news beacon reminded me how far thoughtful, horse-first work can travel. https://youtu.be/D5WZom9mKzc?rel=0 From a Simple Question to a Global Community Cavallo began with a simple question: What if we truly listened to horses and designed hoof-care solutions around their hoof and health needs? From our rural Sunshine Coast base in British Columbia, that quiet curiosity has taken shape over nearly two decades — reaching riders, caretakers, and equine hoof and health care professionals in countries around the

title: Your Cavallo News - April, 2026
text: "After more than 20 years working in hoof care, I’m still learning every day—but one thing has never changed for me: when a horse moves comfortably, everything else improves. That belief is what started Cavallo, and it continues to guide everything we do." - Carole Herder, Cavallo Founder It's a Cavallo Country Cameo! Simple Boots Shine in Ella Langley’s AE Ad Wait… did you catch that?! ? Yep - that's Ella Langley! A customer recently shared the new American Eagle video featuring Ella Langley, and there’s a detail that’s hard to miss: the horse she’s riding is wearing Cavallo Hoof Boots. Seeing those boots appear in a major fashion campaign is a pretty exciting moment. Ella is known to love horses, which raises an intriguing question…could that be her own horse in the ad? If you happen to know who this Cavallo-booted horse belongs to, there’s a free pair of Cavallo Boots waiting for you. Oh, and an introduction would make it even better. Reach out to us! It’s something to feel proud of: the same boots trusted on your horses are also chosen for big productions. From Beyoncé’s “Beyoncé Bowl” NFL Halftime performance to a mini horse in CLBs at the Oscars, professional horses in show business rely on Cavallos for safety and protection—and that speaks volumes. title: Cavallo Winter Hoof Care Guide
text: Cavallo's Winter Hoof Care Guide: Protecting Your Horse’s Hooves with Cavallo Hoof Boots Download Your Winter Hoof Care Guide eBook HERE: Why Download Your Cavallo Winter Hoof Care Guide? This comprehensive Cavallo Winter Hoof Care Guide gives horse owners a practical, step-by-step look into protecting hoof health in cold, wet, and unpredictable conditions. Winter can be one of the toughest seasons on your horse’s hooves. Between frozen ground, mud, snow buildup, and icy footing, maintaining soundness requires a proactive plan. Backed by the trusted performance of Cavallo Hoof Boots, this free, downloadable eBook guide covers everything you need to confidently manage winter riding and turnout! Winter hoof care is not just about surviving the season. It is about keeping your horse comfortable, confident, and moving freely, no matter the weather. Whether your horse is barefoot or shod, transitioning to barefoot, rehabbing from laminitis, or simply navigating icy turnout, this guide provides practical solutions using Cavallo Hoof Boots for winter riding and protection . If you want to: • Prevent snowballing and ice buildup • Improve traction on slick winter footing • Reduce the risk of thrush in wet conditions • Support healthy hoof growth all winter • Keep your horse riding comfortably year-round Then this guide is for you! title: Cavallo Case Study Submission Form
text: Every single week, we hear incredible stories about how Cavallo Boots make a real difference. From helping a horse take their first sound steps after laminitis, to giving comfort and confidence through navicular challenges, thrush recovery, ringbone, rehab, or rough terrain. The messages, photos, and updates you share mean a great deal to us. Now, we want to feature more of those personal journeys via the Cavallo Case Study Submission Form. Cavallo Case Studies are open to every horse and every story. Whether your horse needed short-term support or long-term protection, we want to hear how Cavallos helped them move better, feel better, and live better. No case is too big or too small. If Cavallo boots played a role in your horse’s comfort, recovery, or performance, your experience matters. How will my study be used? Case studies may be shared publicly on our website, social media, email newsletters, or educational materials. If your story is selected, you will be able to view it and share it proudly with your community! Other submissions are used internally to support our Customer Service team, guide product development, and strengthen our educational resources. Even if your case study is not published, your experience still helps shape how we serve horses and riders every day. All case study submissions can opt out of public sharing if preferred. Your feedback does more than i

title: Hoof Cracks with Cavallo Hoof Boots
h1: Treating and Managing Hoof Cracks With Cavallo Hoof Boots
text: Treating and Managing Hoof Cracks With Cavallo Hoof Boots Treating and managing hoof cracks with Cavallo Hoof Boots is an easy, effective approach. Learn what causes vertical, toe, and quarter cracks. Explore how hoof imbalance and environmental stress contribute to wall separation, and what signs indicate deeper structural involvement. This guide outlines proper assessment, trimming considerations, nutritional support, and management strategies to promote strong, healthy horn growth. Discover how Cavallo Hoof Boots help compromised hoof walls, reduce concussion on hard ground, and support comfortable movement during rehabilitation. Table of Contents What are Hoof Cracks Key Factors to Consider Using Cavallo Boots for Hoof Cracks Troubleshooting Hoof Cracks Cavallo Testimonial s Why Choose Cavallo Hoof Boots What are Hoof Cracks, and What Causes Them? Hoof cracks are vertical or sometimes horizontal splits in the hoof wall that can range from narrow, superficial lines to deep fractures that compromise internal hoof structures. Some cracks are cosmetic and harmless, while others extend into sensitive tissue and cause pain, instability, or lameness. Vertical cracks are the most common type and typically follow the direction of the hoof tubules in the wall. Consequently, these types of cracks are often caused by stress on the hoof wall and dietary imbalances. Horizontal cracks oft

title: Information Regarding the Recent Cavallo Price Adjustment:
text: A Small Change, and a Special Discount for You Dear Cavallo Community, As we celebrate 20 years of Cavallo Hoof Boots, we are reflecting on the incredible community that has made this journey possible. This includes you. For two decades, our focus has remained steady: innovation, integrity, and creating hoof protection that truly makes a difference in horses’ lives. We are deeply grateful for your partnership and the trust you place in Cavallo Hoof Boots. Like so many companies, we continue to experience rising costs in materials, manufacturing, and transportation. Over the years, we have worked hard to absorb these increases wherever possible. However, in order to maintain the quality, research, and service standards you expect from Cavallo, must implement a price adjustment effective March 1, 2026. This decision was not made lightly. Our commitment remains the same: to deliver our exceptional hoof boots, stand behind them fully, and support you and your horse in every way we can. Thank you for being part of the Cavallo story. We are proud to continue this journey with you. With appreciation, Carole Herder Founder Cavallo Hoof Boots Sign up to get 10% off your first Cavallo Hoof Boots order: With gratitude, Carole Herder President and founder of Cavallo Horse & Rider Inc Carole Herder, President and founder of Cavallo Horse & Rider Inc., is an internationally acclaimed figure

title: Your Cavallo News - May 2026
text: "No two hooves are created equal… and that truth continues to guide everything we do at Cavallo." - Carole From Worn-Down Hooves to Hope: A Donkey Trapped in a Canal - And What Saved his Feet This month, we want to show you something real. A donkey was rescued after struggling to escape a concrete canal. His hooves were worn down and he was in pain, unable to move comfortably. Within moments of wearing Cavallo boots, he was walking again. Here’s why this matters for your equine… After being abandoned and let down by a string of owners, Aquaman was seen wandering for a week, scared and alone, before he fell into a canal... This poor donkey found himself trapped in the cold, rushing water of an Arizona canal, with walls too steep to climb and footing too slick. He fought so hard to free himself! He tried again and again to climb and haul himself out against the unforgiving concrete walls. His hooves scraped, slid, and wore down, each desperate attempt leaving him weaker than before. When rescuers arrived, they found him struggling, still trying, refusing to give up even as exhaustion set in... He didn’t understand why he couldn’t escape - only that he had to keep trying. Firefighters worked carefully, using ropes and vehicles to guide him out, their experience with livestock turning a dangerous situation into a fragile chance at survival. And finally, he was pulled to solid groun

With the right knowledge and a willingness to look a little deeper, small, thoughtful changes can transform your horse’s comfort, soundness, and overall health. title: Cavallo Journal - Late April 2026
h1: From Hoof Crack to Comeback! A Cavallo Case Study:
text: Our equines have a way of keeping us honest - and on our toes… It's those soft, quiet nudges that keep us pushing forward at Cavallo. - Carole Why Trek is The Proven Foundation Behind Consteed A Comfortable Horse Rewards Its Rider For veterinarians, this means a powerful new tool for monitoring movement, supporting rehabilitation, and keeping horses comfortable during treatment. For everyday riders and trainers, it means confident hoof protection on difficult terrain, combined with valuable insight into performance and well-being. Every barn, riding facility and equine veterinary clinic strives for the same goal: keeping horses comfortable, sound, and able to perform at their best. When horses move freely without pain and with full confidence, they reward their riders with better stride, greater willingness, and stronger performance. Consteed brings together trusted hoof protection and modern technology to help make this possible, giving both horses and the people who care for them a significant advantage. Where Trust Meets Innovation The Consteed Smart Horse Sneaker is built on the Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot for a reason... Trek already provides one of the most trusted therapeutic and performance foundations in modern hoof care. Known for its lightweight construction, durable upper, and flexible TPU upper, the Trek Hoof Boot protects the hoof while still allowing natural movement
